is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study analyzes Plasmodium falciparum Pfcrt codon 72-76 haplotypes in Korogwe District, Tanzania.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt codon 72-76 haplotypes (CVMNK, CVIET, SVMNT), covering codons 72, 74, 75, 76 - within target list (72,74,75,76).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives absolute numbers per haplotype per village per year; text gives frequencies with denominators (e.g. CVIET 95% n=54 Kwamasimba 2003, SVMNT 13% n=4 in 2004).

sub_country_location.evidence: Data are broken down by two villages, Mkokola and Kwamasimba, in Korogwe District, northern Tanzania - sub-national resolution in Table 1 and Figure 1.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Surveys conducted July 2003 and March 2004, reported separately per year - single-year resolution.

african_field_samples.evidence: Finger-prick blood samples from children/adolescents with confirmed P. falciparum infections collected in two villages in Tanzania.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary cross-sectional field study with PCR/SSOP ELISA genotyping.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples collected 'As part of ongoing immunoepidemiological studies of malaria' and 'under the auspices of the Joint Malaria Programme,' suggesting possible overlap with other cohort/consortium studies.

supplement.evidence: Table 1 and Figure 1 provide the extractable per-village, per-year counts; no supplementary data required.

assessment.summary: Cross-sectional surveys in Kwamasimba and Mkokola villages, Korogwe District, Tanzania (2003 and 2004) genotyped Pfcrt codon 72-76 haplotypes (CVMNK, CVIET, SVMNT) in P. falciparum-positive samples. Table 1 provides absolute haplotype counts per village per year, giving sub-country and single-year resolution. First documentation of the SVMNT haplotype in Africa.
